items.title: Submission 01 — CLI log parser
items.body: Clean structure and good test coverage. Missed the streaming requirement for large files.

items.title: Submission 02 — CLI log parser
items.body: Fast and idiomatic, handles streaming well. No tests at all, and the README is one line.

items.title: Submission 03 — CLI log parser
items.body: Over-engineered — a plugin system for a take-home. Works, but I'd worry about scope judgment on the job.

items.title: Submission 04 — CLI log parser
items.body: Correct, well tested, thoughtful error messages. Slightly slow to read due to heavy abstraction.
